title: Zotero 9-only core: manifest + direct mergeItems
goal: Make plugin Zotero 9 only: update version source files (manifest.json, update-template.json) to strict_min/max 9.0/9.*, switch merger.ts to direct ChromeUtils.importESModule mergeItems, delete dead patchMergePDFAttachments. No version branching.
in_scope: Update version source files: manifest.json and update-template.json to strict_min_version 9.0, strict_max_version 9.* (update.json/update-beta.json are generated from template by build.mjs:139)
merger.ts uses ChromeUtils.importESModule for mergeItems directly (no Zotero.Items.merge fallback)
Add ChromeUtils stub to test setup
Add tests for mergeItems call path and JSON prefill logic
out_of_scope: Customizing or extending mergeItems behavior (Zotero 9 features like annotation preservation come for free via direct call)
acceptance: manifest.json and update-template.json have strict_min_version 9.0 AND strict_max_version 9.*; npm run build generates correct update.json/update-beta.json
merger.ts calls mergeItems via ChromeUtils.importESModule directly
No isZotero9OrLater or version.ts in codebase
MANUAL: Plugin installs and merges work in Zotero 9
